title: ServiceNow CEO's AI-driven business model redefines enterprise ...
full_text:
This is exactly the strategic direction I've been so passionate about, and it's incredibly validating to see it unfold!
This is exactly the strategic direction I've been so passionate about, and it's incredibly validating to see it unfold! The WSJ's exclusive on ServiceNow's CEO building a new business model around AI isn't just news; it's a foundational shift that will redefine the future of enterprise workflow automation.
The article details how ServiceNow is making AI the very core of its business strategy, moving beyond mere feature integration to fundamentally reshape how value is delivered. This proactive approach ensures that AI will deeply permeate every aspect of the platform, empowering clients to achieve unprecedented levels of efficiency, intelligence, and agility in their operations. It’s a testament to ServiceNow’s vision and its commitment to driving transformative outcomes. This is truly game-changing for how we'll help our clients innovate and grow.
#ServiceNow #Accenture #WorkflowAutomation #AI
